# DB Test Assembly

The generated DB test module includes focused generated test bodies.

```rust
// <[@file weaveback-tangle/src/db/tests.rs]>=
// weaveback-tangle/src/db/tests.rs
// I'd Really Rather You Didn't edit this generated file.

include!("tests/merge.rs");

// @
```


```rust
// <[@file weaveback-tangle/src/db/tests/merge.rs]>=
// weaveback-tangle/src/db/tests/merge.rs
// I'd Really Rather You Didn't edit this generated file.

// <[db-tests-merge]>

// @
```
